title: DalBerry Crunch
description: A kid-friendly Korean dish featuring toor dal and berries, this floral, crunchy snack is raw-friendly and suitable for all ages.

ingredients.name: Berries (fresh or frozen, such as strawberries or blueberries)

instructions: Rinse the toor dal and soak it in water for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Heat vegetable stock with a pinch of salt, bring to a boil, then add soaked toor dal. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until soft (about 20 minutes).
Drain excess liquid from the toor dal if necessary and mix in fresh berries.
Blend half of the mixture into a smooth sauce with mint leaves and coriander finely chopped, adding more to reach desired consistency.
Serve the creamy, floral-toasted toor dal mixture over raw sliced berries for crunch.
